title: FORSAKEN MODPACK
description: A very challenging realistic horror modpack where you try to survive in a dying wasteland without going insane
body:
>*A dying world cries for help, but no one answered*

![A quite desolate wasteland...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DA2NP5Fw/images/8c008307d56ece0beadd7db5e15b94c42a076870.png)

# Details
The FORSAKEN Modpack makes you immersed in a dying wasteland where a deadly virus ravaged and assimilated the majority of lifeforms. Your goal? Survive as many days as you can without going insane!

## Features & Tips

- You start with some gear that you found while scavenging cities. Though you better start mining materials so you dont run out of bullets!

- Health and hunger won't be the least of your problems; You'll also have to worry about ***Temperature, Thirst and Sanity!***

- ***Melee combat has been revamped*** with the Better Combat and Combat Roll mods!

- Scavenge cities and old underground mineshafts for materials and ***accessories!***

- There's a ***new way of obtaining leather*** by smelting rotten flesh, and you can make ***gunpowder out of coal/charcoal!***

- Be careful when mining coal, you might get the ***black lung!***

- This modpack features the ESSENTIAL mod, a much easier way to ***play with friends*** without the need of creating a server!

- Includes ***voice chat*** for better immersion with friends!

- Features an ***Original OST*** made by Azernion!
